summary: Journey Page rebuild testing completed. Backend: 25/25 tests passed. Frontend: All 20 specified features verified working. Fixed bug in coach CRUD endpoints (was using /coaches instead of /college-coaches).
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: JourneyPage.js was using /athlete/coaches endpoint instead of /athlete/college-coaches - corrected in handleSaveCoach and handleDeleteCoach
EmailComposer correctly shows MOCKED disclaimer 'Gmail integration coming soon!' and logs email to timeline instead of sending
Progress Rail stages are clickable only for future stages - clicking past/current stages has no effect
Floating Action Bar correctly hides when program is archived or committed
CelebrationHero shows when has_coach_reply signal is true
NextStepCard automation rules working correctly based on latest event type
seed_data_creation: Test interactions created during testing (prefixed with TEST_) for verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: Journey page fully verified. University of Florida program has 11 interactions, 3 coach replies, pulse=Hot, stage=in_conversation (Talking). All 4 FAB modals (Email, Log, Replied, Follow-up), coach CRUD, stage advancement modal, archive/reactivate, and back navigation working.

Backend_APIs.GET_program_has_journey_rail: PASS - stages, active, line_fill, pulse all present
Backend_APIs.GET_journey_returns_timeline: PASS - timeline array with event_type, title, date, content
Backend_APIs.POST_interactions: PASS - creates interaction and auto-sets follow-up
Backend_APIs.Coach_CRUD: PASS - create, update, delete all working

Frontend_Journey_Page.progress_rail_6_stages: PASS - Added, Outreach, Talking, Visit, Offer, Committed
Frontend_Journey_Page.next_step_automation_card: PASS - Shows contextual 'What's Next' based on latest event
Frontend_Journey_Page.floating_action_bar_buttons: PASS - Email, Log, Replied, Follow-up all present
Frontend_Journey_Page.email_composer_modal: PASS - Opens with To, Subject, Body, Log Email button (MOCKED)
Frontend_Journey_Page.log_interaction_modal: PASS - Type, Outcome, Date, Notes fields
Frontend_Journey_Page.followup_scheduler_modal: PASS - Date and Next Action fields
Frontend_Journey_Page.coaching_staff_sidebar: PASS - +Add button, coach cards with edit/delete
Frontend_Journey_Page.add_coach_form: PASS - Name, Role, Email, Phone fields
Frontend_Journey_Page.engagement_stats_sidebar: PASS - Total Outreach, Coach Replies, Days Since Activity, Interactions
Frontend_Journey_Page.archive_reactivate_toggle: PASS - Toggles status, hides FAB when archived
Frontend_Journey_Page.stage_click_opens_modal: PASS - StageLogModal shows for future stage advancement
